'''鈭歴-v-zh-d''' ('''kasavzhedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chagrin|chagrin]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-v-zh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chagrin|chagrin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-v-zh-d
|-
! Lemma
| kasavzhedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisavzhedoko|thisavzhedoko]] || [[word:jisavzhedoko|jisavzhedoko]] || [[word:shisavzhedoko|shisavzhedoko]] || [[word:kisavzhedoko|kisavzhedoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosavzhedoko|thosavzhedoko]] || [[word:josavzhedoko|josavzhedoko]] || [[word:shosavzhedoko|shosavzhedoko]] || [[word:kosavzhedoko|kosavzhedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙savzhedoko|th忙savzhedoko]] || [[word:j忙savzhedoko|j忙savzhedoko]] || [[word:sh忙savzhedoko|sh忙savzhedoko]] || [[word:k忙savzhedoko|k忙savzhedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasavzhedoko|thathasavzhedoko]] || [[word:jajasavzhedoko|jajasavzhedoko]] || [[word:shashasavzhedoko|shashasavzhedoko]] || [[word:kakasavzhedoko|kakasavzhedoko]]
|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
